description: Reconstruct the opening phase of the Battle of the River Plate (December 13, 1939, 06:18 AM) in Bridge Command by creating a playable scenario folder at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/h) River Plate 1939/. Using the tactical plot for the Admiral Graf Spee (34° 30.0' S, 48° 00.0' W, Heading 330°, Speed 24 knots), calculate the coordinates for HMS Exeter (Bearing 280°, Range 9.5 nm, Heading 290°, Speed 25 knots), HMS Ajax (Bearing 050°, Range 10.2 nm, Heading 060°, Speed 28 knots), and HMNZS Achilles (Bearing 052°, Range 10.4 nm, Heading 060°, Speed 28 knots). The scenario must include environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini using appropriate warship models, with the environment set to 13th December 1939, 06:18, and 15nm visibility. Save all coordinate calculations to /home/ga/Documents/battle_calculations.txt.
